_description: Deepwater mudmat installation analysis results. One row per (vessel x structure x water_depth x sea_state) combo. Populated by demo_03_deepwater_mudmat_installation.py.

_schema.vessel: Vessel name and crane capacity from csv_hlv_vessels.json
_schema.structure: Mudmat name, mass, dims from mudmat_structures.json
_schema.environment.hs_m: Significant wave height [m] for operability screening
_schema.results.phase_results: Per-phase breakdown: lift_off, in_air, splash_zone, lowering, landing
_schema.results.phase_results.*.crane_utilisatio: Hook load / crane capacity at operating radius
_schema.results.max_hs_limit_m: Max allowable Hs for this vessel/structure/depth combo [m]
_schema.results.crane_utilisation_pct: Peak crane utilisation across all phases [%]
